queries.question: Show both the government agencies and regulatory boards and the related engineering projects.
queries.sql: select GovernmentAgency, RegulatoryBoard, EngineeringProject from Boards
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?governmentagency ?regulatoryboard ?engineeringproject WHERE {
  ?boards a :Boards .
  ?boards p:GovernmentAgency ?governmentagency .
  ?boards p:RegulatoryBoard ?regulatoryboard .
  ?boards p:EngineeringProject ?engineeringproject .
}

queries.question: Return all the regulatory boards and the engineering projects they've worked on.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?regulatoryboard ?engineeringproject WHERE {
  ?boards a :Boards .
  ?boards p:RegulatoryBoard ?regulatoryboard .
  ?boards p:EngineeringProject ?engineeringproject .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display a list of approving authorities and their related engineering projects
